completed_tasks: Task 1: 类型系统扩展 (octo-types) — MemoryType, EventData, SortField + MemoryEntry/SearchOptions/MemoryFilter 新增字段
Task 2: DB Migration v12 + SqliteMemoryStore 扩展 — memories +3 columns, session_summaries table, SessionSummaryStore (4 tests)
Task 3: 接线 SessionEndMemoryHook + MemoryInjector — AgentExecutor session-end hook + harness Zone B+ injection
Task 4: EventExtractor — 事件提取器 (9 tests)
Task 5: SessionSummarizer — 会话摘要生成 (8 tests)
Task 6: Session End 完整流程接线 — 3-step pipeline (hook → event extraction → summary)
Task 7: memory_timeline 工具 — 时间线查询 (11 tests)
phase_name: Phase AG — 记忆和上下文机制增强
notes: G1 COMPLETE (3/3). G2 COMPLETE (4/4). Commits: 0f5d04e (EventExtractor+SessionSummarizer), d35ecc4 (session end 3-step pipeline), a7586ad (memory_timeline tool).
